sections.title: Antiphon #178 - Cf. Est 4: 17
sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Within your will, O Lord, all things are established, and there is none that can resist your will. For you have made all things, the heaven and the earth, and all that is held within the circle of heaven; you are the Lord of all.

sections.title: Psalm 95: 1-2, 6-7, 8-9
sections.author: Ben Walther, SP2025
sections.snippet: If today you hear his voice, harden not your hearts.

sections.author: Peter 1:25
sections.snippet: The word of the Lord remains for ever. This is the word that has been proclaimed to you.
sections.title: Alleluia
Come Lord, Jesus
sections.author: Steve Angrisano and Tom Tomaszek
sections.snippet: Come, Lord Jesus, come. Come and fill my heart with your life. Hold me close, Lord, hold me tight, and come, Lord Jesus, Come.

sections.author: John W. Thompson, Randy Scruggs
sections.snippet: Lord, prepare me to be a sanctuary; pure and holy; tried and true. With thanksgiving; I'll be a living Sanctuary for You.
sections.title: Sanctuary
Shelter Me, O God
sections.author: Bob Hurd
sections.snippet: Shelter me, O God, hide me in the shadow of your wings. You alone are my hope.

sections.title: One Bread, One Body
sections.author: John Foley SJ
sections.snippet: One bread, one body, one Lord of all, one cup of blessing which we bless. And we, though many,

sections.title: With All Your Strength
sections.author: Chris Muglia and Jeff Thomas
sections.snippet: Praise the Lord with all your heart, with all your mind and soul, with all your strength give praise.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
